title: Intraperitoneal L-dopa injection in mice
steps: Mice were acclimated to the room for 01:00:00

Prepare the L-dopa mix fresh every day. Prepare a master mix of: 12.5mg/kg L-dopa and 12.5mg/kg benserazide dissolved in sterile saline with 0.25% citrate (wt/vol). Calculate grams depending on number of mice to be injected. Using vortex will dissolve the solution easier.
Mice are injected intraperitoneally with the 12.5mg/kg L-dopa and 12.5mg/kg benserazide solution.
One hour post injection, mice were tested using the appropiate behavior protocol.
creator: Natalia Lopez-GonzalezdelRey
